action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 10 achieved 74.60% accuracy with a uniform 3-model ensemble (raw ConvNeXt, cleaned ConvNeXt, ResNet50) and TenCrop TTA. We have ~36 minutes and 20 iterations remaining, so time is the binding constraint. Analysis: Uniform weighting is likely suboptimal. The raw ConvNeXt alone scores 72.67%, while the cleaned ConvNeXt is weaker (~69%). A quick weight tuning on the cleaned training labels (train_cleaned.pt) should find better convex weights and yield a small but free accuracy gain without any new training. Decision: 1) Write tune_ensemble.py to grid-search ensemble weights on an 8192-sample subset of train_cleaned.pt. 2) Update predict.py to load and apply the tuned weights. 3) Submit evaluation.
